query:
SELECT m.id, m.nome,
  fd.updatedAt as financial_updated,
  iv.updatedAt as ivmp_updated,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pillar_part_content ppc WHERE ppc.menteeId = m.id) as part_content_count,
  (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pc.pillarId ORDER BY pc.pillarId) FROM pillar_conclusions pc WHERE pc.menteeId = m.id AND pc.liberadoParaMentorado = 1) as released_pillars
FROM mentees m
LEFT JOIN financial_data fd ON fd.menteeId = m.id
LEFT JOIN ivmp_data iv ON iv.menteeId = m.id
WHERE m.ativo = 1
ORDER BY m.id;
